positive: A vibrant, symmetrical mandala design featuring stylized constellations intersecting with glowing bioluminescent flora. The central element is a detailed depiction of crescent moons and nebulae rendered in deep indigos, celestial blues, and soft emerald greens. Geometric filigree outlines the organic shapes, giving it a tattoo-style, sacred geometry feel. The overall composition must be highly contrasted, allowing the dark cosmic background to make the glowing botanical elements pop, suitable for printing on dark apparel. Flat vector illustration style mixed with subtle watercolor gradients, highly symmetrical, central composition, sharp lines, graphic design print art.
negative: text, typography, signature, logo, watermark, low detail, grainy, blur, dirty, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, solid color blocks, gradient noise, jpeg artifacts
